en_title: Monster Fantasy Combines the Thrill of Monster Hunter with the Cosy Chill of Animal Crossing | IGN Preview
cn_title: 《怪物猎人》《集合啦 动物森友会》《Monster Fantasy》融合怪猎与动森
subtitle: 猎兽与钓鱼两不误
opus_summary: IGN在上海试玩了动作RPG《Monster Fantasy》，本作融合《怪物猎人》狩猎与《集合啦 动物森友会》社区玩法，可捕怪当坐骑、经营村庄。游戏未公布发售日，PC公测数周后开启。

paragraphs.en: I wouldn’t have thought that the Venn diagram representing fans of the beast-slaying Monster Hunter series and lovers of Animal Crossing’s cosy community-building would have too much overlap, but promising action-RPG Monster Fantasy may well prove me wrong. At a recent BiliBili Game First Look event in Shanghai, I got hands-on with a very early build of this hybrid adventure that gives players the flexibility to choose whether they want to seek the thrilling challenge of big game beast-hunting or the laid back chilling of just catching bugs and good vibes with their fellow villagers. It’s only early days in Monster Fantasy’s development and there’s clearly still a lot of work to be done, but so far this combination seems like it could be as pleasant a surprise pairing as the first time I dipped a french fry into my thickshake.
paragraphs.cn: 我原本以为，《怪物猎人》系列的猎兽粉丝和《集合啦！动物森友会》的悠闲社区建设爱好者之间不会有太多交集，但这款很有潜力的动作RPG《Monster Fantasy》很可能让我跌破眼镜。在近期上海哔哩哔哩游戏首发活动上，我上手了这款混搭冒险游戏的极早期版本，它赋予了玩家灵活的选择：是寻求大型猎物狩猎的刺激挑战，还是放松下来，和村民一起抓虫子、享受好心情。尽管《Monster Fantasy》的开发尚处早期，显然还有大量工作要做，但就目前而言，这种组合或许会像第一次把薯条蘸进奶昔那样，是一份令人惊喜的搭配。

paragraphs.en: Monster Fantasy is an action-RPG of many contrasts. That much was apparent as soon as I laid eyes on the art style, which takes adorable Chibi-style character designs and juxtaposes them within a series of realistic and detail-rich biomes, from rolling hills to desert plains and intimidatingly vertical volcanic areas that make up a kingdom called Eldoras. These monster-riddled expanses are accessed via the large teleportation crystals found around the main village hub, though the bulk of them were locked in the build that I played, restricting me to the exploration of a woodland area pockmarked with caves to explore and small streams to navigate.
paragraphs.cn: 《Monster Fantasy》是一款充满对比的动作RPG。我第一眼看到美术风格就意识到了这一点：可爱的Q版角色设计，被放置在写实且细节丰富的系列生态群落中——从起伏的丘陵到沙漠平原，再到陡峭骇人的火山地带，共同构筑了一个名为艾多拉斯的王国。这些布满怪物的广阔区域，通过主村枢纽周围的大型传送水晶进入，但在我试玩的版本中，大多数区域都被锁定了，我只被限制在一片林地中探索，那里遍布可供探寻的洞穴和需要穿行的小溪。

paragraphs.en: There are four character classes available in Monster Fantasy, with Chinese developer Jotoyo hinting to me that a fifth might be added before the game’s eventual release. The classes are largely self explanatory – there’s a warrior, a swordsman, an archer, and a mage – but the differences between them are quite substantial, and you can switch between them on the fly simply by swapping out your currently equipped weapon. Unequip your sword and shield and replace them with a staff, and you instantly switch movesets from warrior to mage, for example. Although given that the inventory menu doesn’t pause the action you need to ensure you’re out of harm’s way before you take a moment to change up your approach.
paragraphs.cn: 《Monster Fantasy》中有四种职业，中国开发商Jotoyo向我暗示，游戏最终发布前可能会增加第五种。这些职业从名称上看基本一目了然——战士、剑士、弓手、法师——但彼此间的差异相当大，而且你只需更换当前装备的武器，就能随时切换职业。例如，卸下剑盾换上法杖，招式就会立即从战士变为法师。不过，鉴于打开物品菜单不会暂停游戏动作，你最好先确保自己身处安全地带，再腾出手来改变战斗方式。

paragraphs.en: Warrior seemed like the most approachable class for beginners, seeing as though it allows you to block incoming attacks with a shield to minimise damage and, if you nail the timing, perform perfect guards that make you temporarily invulnerable so you can deliver a series of uppercut sword slashes and shield bashes without putting yourself in danger. If you’d prefer to dodge rather than block, then the swordsman class might be more your speed. It equips you with a pair of katana for rapid horizontal and vertical slices, and each perfect dodge you nail introduces a doppelganger of your character into the arena, who can eventually be triggered to attack your monstrous prey in one simultaneous assault from all angles.
paragraphs.cn: 战士似乎是新手最容易上手的职业，因为它允许你用盾牌格挡来袭攻击以减少伤害，而如果时机把握精准，还能使出完美防御，让你短时间内无敌，从而能够打出一系列上挑剑击和盾击，却不必将自己置于险境。如果你偏好闪避而非格挡，那么剑士职业可能更合你的胃口。它会为你装备一对武士刀，能快速进行水平和垂直斩击，每当你成功使出完美闪避，就会在场上召唤出一个角色分身，最终你可以触发分身，从四面八方同时向怪物猎物发起攻击。

paragraphs.en: I also dabbled with the archer, who’s able to deliver barrages of homing arrows from afar, but my favourite of the two ranged classes available was definitely the mage. By holding down the right trigger the mage can hover in the air, which makes it the most mobile of the classes, but it can also cast spells by chanting combinations of four different elements mapped to the controller’s face buttons. You can volley shards of ice or blast swirling tornado attacks, but you can also perform more defensive magic such as conjuring up a crystal-like wall to absorb a single enemy attack. Charge up a combination of fire, water, earth, and wind, and you can blast a sustained energy beam at your imposing opponent that steadily strips health off it in a spray of hit point numbers. I was serving up more earth, wind, and fire hits than a casino lounge cover band.
paragraphs.cn: 我也尝试了弓手，能从远处射出成簇的追踪箭矢，但在两个远程职业中，我最喜欢的绝对是法师。按住右扳机键，法师可以在空中悬停，这使其成为机动性最强的职业，而且它还能通过吟唱映射到手柄正面按键的四种元素组合来施放法术。你可以连射冰晶碎片，或卷起旋转的龙卷风攻击，但也可以施展偏重防御的魔法，比如召唤出一面水晶墙，吸收一次敌方攻击。蓄力组合火、水、土、风，你就能向强大的对手轰出一发持续的能量光束，让生命值在跳动的伤害数字中稳步下降。我打出的土、风、火攻击，比赌场休息厅的翻唱乐队还要多。

paragraphs.en: While the full game will feature over 50 monster types, the build that I played was limited to just three major bosses: a grizzly bear-sized squirrel, a large rhino beetle covered in stony plates of armour, and an enormous griffin that was able to unleash a combination of fierce assaults both from the ground and in the air. While I was able to make light work of the squirrel, whose rolling attacks were clearly telegraphed and quite easy to counter, my battles with the beetle and griffin were far more drawn out in comparison, but also much more satisfying to complete. I particularly enjoyed blasting the armour plates off the beetle in order to deal additional damage to the exposed flesh underneath, frantically unloading as many attacks as I could before it could burrow into the earth and emerge with its stony shell repaired.
paragraphs.cn: 虽然完整游戏将有超过50种怪物，但我试玩的版本只限于三个主要头目：一头灰熊大小的松鼠，一只覆盖着石质甲板的巨大犀甲虫，以及一只能从地面和空中发动连串凶猛攻击的巨型狮鹫。松鼠的滚动攻击前摇明显，相当容易反制，因此我轻松取胜，而与甲虫和狮鹫的战斗相比之下则拖长了许多，但完成后也更有满足感。我尤其喜欢轰掉甲虫的甲板，以便对其甲片下的暴露肉体造成额外伤害，抢在它钻进土里重新披覆石甲之前，拼命倾泻尽可能多的攻击。

paragraphs.en: Besting that beetle took a full 20 minutes, and my reward was merely the sense of triumph I gained by watching its freshly conquered corpse collapse in a heap. However, in the full game you’ll be able to capture each monster and convert them into mounts, as well as cultivate rare crafting ingredients from their dead bodies in order to assemble stronger weapons and armour in a quicktime event-based forge system.
paragraphs.cn: 击败那只甲虫足足花了我20分钟，而我的回报不过是看着它刚刚被征服的尸体轰然倒下时所感受到的胜利快感。不过，在正式版游戏中，你能够捕获每一只怪物并将其驯化为坐骑，还可以从它们的尸体上采集稀有制作材料，以便在一个基于快速反应事件的锻造系统中制造出更强的武器和护甲。

paragraphs.en: Once you beam yourself back to the safe confines of your village, the soundtrack shifts from up-tempo metal to an eminently more laid back flute and acoustic guitar pairing, with the gentle chittering of wildlife sounds further enhancing the relaxing atmosphere. In the settlement I explored in the demo build, there were countless homes, mills, and vendor stalls, as well as a bulletin board for quests, fields dotted with scarecrows and haystacks, and a tavern to potentially sink a few ales in after a hard day of griffin griefing. Aside from the NPCs peddling their wares in the village’s market, there wasn’t much in the way of interactivity here, but I’m told that in the finished game you’ll be able to completely customise the layout and gather resources to expand the township as you see fit.
paragraphs.cn: 当你传送回村庄的安全地带后，配乐便从快节奏的金属乐切换成由长笛和原声吉他合奏的、无比悠闲的音轨，野生动物轻柔的鸣叫声更烘托出放松的氛围。在试玩版中我探索的据点里，有无数的房屋、磨坊和商贩摊位，还有一个发布任务用的布告栏，田野里点缀着稻草人和干草堆，还有一家酒馆，在你饱受狮鹫折磨一整天后，或许可以在那里喝上几杯麦芽酒。除了在村庄集市里兜售货物的NPC外，这里几乎没有太多可互动内容，但我得知在完整版游戏中，你将能够完全自定义布局，并根据自己的需要收集资源来扩建小镇。

paragraphs.en: I’m also assured that every villager will have their own personality and pursue their own hobbies, but since the build of Monster Fantasy that I played was entirely in Chinese – and there was only so much of juggling a controller in one hand and pointing the Google Translate app on my phone at the screen in the other that I could manage – I’ll have to take the developer’s word for it for now. I was also told that the team is currently exploring the inclusion of romance with your fellow villagers, should you wish to take a break from taming dragons found in the wild in order to tame your neighbour’s heart instead.
paragraphs.cn: 我也被告知，每位村民都会有自己的性格和爱好，但由于我游玩的《Monster Fantasy》版本完全是中文——而且一手拿着手柄、另一只手拿着手机上的谷歌翻译应用对准屏幕，我能做到的也就只有这么多了——所以我目前只能暂且相信开发者的说法。我还得知，团队正在考虑加入与村民之间的恋爱系统，如果你想暂时放下驯服荒野中的巨龙，转而征服邻居的心，那也没问题。

paragraphs.en: In fact freedom of player choice is core to the Monster Fantasy experience. If you want to try and slay every behemoth that stalks its game world then you’re free to do so, but if you’re a more peace-loving player then you can just fish, mine, cut down trees, and catch exotic butterflies, and focus on growing your township by inviting NPCs you meet throughout the world to move in, much like Animal Crossing. Even if you require a certain exotic ingredient for crafting, such as the teeth that can only be claimed by killing one of the aforementioned super squirrels, you don’t have to actually get your hands dirty – you can just task one of the more battleready villagers to go on a hunt in your stead. Just don’t send anyone you’ve become too attached to, because there’s always the risk they might not come back in one piece if you happen to send them to stalk a particularly powerful beast. Alternatively, you can recruit NPCs to come and hunt alongside you, or band together with up to three other friends via Monster Fantasy’s four-player co-op system.
paragraphs.cn: 事实上，玩家选择的自由度正是《Monster Fantasy》体验的核心。如果你想尝试猎杀在这片游戏世界中徘徊的每一头巨兽，那大可以放手去做；但如果你是一位更加倾向和平的玩家，也可以只管钓鱼、挖矿、伐木以及捕捉奇异的蝴蝶，并专注于通过邀请你在世界各地遇到的NPC入住来发展你的小镇，这与《集合啦！动物森友会》颇为相似。即使你制作装备需要某种稀有材料——比如只有通过杀死前面提到的超级松鼠才能获得的牙齿——你也完全不必亲自动手：只需派一位更擅长战斗的村民代替你去狩猎即可。只是别派任何你太过牵挂的人，因为要是你恰好让他们去跟踪一只特别强大的野兽，他们就有可能有去无回。或者，你也可以招募NPC与你一同狩猎，或通过《Monster Fantasy》的四人合作系统与最多三名好友组队。

paragraphs.en: Monster Fantasy doesn’t yet have a confirmed release date, and given the early state of the build I played I wouldn’t anticipate the finished game any earlier than mid-2027. In the meantime, the developers told me to expect a public beta test for the PC version to go live in the coming weeks. That beta test will feature a full English translation, and will also include a comprehensive tutorial not present in this preview build to get players up to speed with Monster Fantasy’s systems much faster. Getting Monster Fantasy into the hands of the fans early seems very important to the development team, because it indicated to me that it will be relying on player feedback to help sculpt everything from the design of the game itself to determining the monster that will appear on the game’s cover. Clearly Monster Fantasy is focussed on fostering a healthy community, both within the game itself and in the fanbase that follows its development, and I’m definitely keen to see how the experience evolves from here.
paragraphs.cn: 《Monster Fantasy》目前尚未确定发售日期，考虑到我游玩的版本还处于早期阶段，我预计最终成品不会早于2027年年中。与此同时，开发者告诉我，PC版的公开测试预计将在未来几周内上线。该公测将提供完整的英文翻译，并包含一个在此预览版中未出现的新手教程，能让玩家更快上手《Monster Fantasy》的系统。让粉丝尽早玩到《Monster Fantasy》似乎对开发团队至关重要，因为在我看来，这意味着游戏将依赖玩家反馈来打磨从游戏设计本身，到决定游戏封面上的怪物等方方面面。显然，《Monster Fantasy》致力于培育一个健康的社区，无论是在游戏内，还是在其开发过程中的粉丝群体里，而我个人也十分期待看到这款游戏后续的发展。

paragraphs.en: Tristan Ogilvie is a senior video producer at IGN's Sydney office. He attended BiliBili Game First Look as a guest of the organisers.
paragraphs.cn: Tristan Ogilvie是IGN悉尼办公室的高级视频制作人，他应主办方邀请参加了BiliBili游戏首发活动。
